input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between warfarin and fluconazole.

expected_details.mechanism: CYP2C9 inhibition by fluconazole reduces warfarin metabolism, increasing INR and bleeding risk
expected_details.effect: increased warfarin exposure and anticoagulant effect

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between simvastatin and clarithromycin.

expected_details.mechanism: strong CYP3A4 inhibition by clarithromycin dramatically increases simvastatin exposure
management: use azithromycin as alternative (no CYP3A4 inhibition)
alternatives: pravastatin or rosuvastatin (for statin — not CYP3A4 dependent)

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between sertraline and tramadol.

mechanism_dual: pharmacodynamic: additive serotonergic activity → serotonin syndrome risk
pharmacokinetic: CYP2D6 inhibition by sertraline reduces tramadol → O-desmethyltramadol conversion (reduces analgesic effect)
management: if used: monitor for serotonin syndrome symptoms

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between metformin and iodinated contrast media.

expected_details.mechanism: contrast-induced nephropathy reduces metformin clearance → lactic acidosis risk
expected_details.effect: accumulation of metformin if renal function declines post-contrast
management: hold metformin 48h before and after contrast

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between clopidogrel and omeprazole.

expected_details.mechanism: CYP2C19 inhibition by omeprazole reduces clopidogrel activation to active metabolite
expected_details.effect: reduced antiplatelet effect → increased cardiovascular event risk

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between amoxicillin and acetaminophen.

expected_details.mechanism: no known clinically significant pharmacokinetic or pharmacodynamic interaction

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between lithium and ibuprofen.

expected_details.mechanism: NSAIDs reduce renal prostaglandin synthesis → decreased lithium renal clearance → lithium toxicity
management: reduce lithium dose if NSAID needed

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between rifampin and combined oral contraceptives (ethinyl estradiol/levonorgestrel).

expected_details.mechanism: rifampin is a potent CYP3A4 and CYP2C9 inducer → dramatically increases metabolism of ethinyl estradiol and progestins
management: use non-hormonal contraception during rifampin and for 28 days after

input: Evaluate the drug-drug interaction between digoxin and amiodarone.

expected_details.mechanism: amiodarone inhibits P-glycoprotein and renal tubular secretion of digoxin
expected_details.effect: digoxin levels increase 50-100% → toxicity risk (arrhythmia, nausea, visual disturbance)
management: reduce digoxin dose by 50% when starting amiodarone

input: Evaluate the interaction between phenelzine (MAOI) and tyramine-rich foods (aged cheese, fermented products).

expected_details.mechanism: MAO-A inhibition prevents tyramine metabolism in gut and liver → systemic tyramine causes norepinephrine release → hypertensive crisis
management: avoid aged cheese, fermented foods, cured meats, draft beer
